name: Snyk
description: Monitor Snyk security findings including open source vulnerabilities, code issues, and project security posture

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Snyk at https://app.snyk.io.
2. Go to Account Settings (top right menu) > General.
3. Under 'Auth Token', click 'click to show' and copy your token.
4. Paste the token below.

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Snyk Account Settings > General > Auth Token. Requires read access to your organization.

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies that Snyk projects are actively monitored for vulnerabilities

checks.name: Sanitized Inputs
checks.description: Checks for critical and high severity open source vulnerabilities across monitored projects

checks.name: License Compliance
checks.description: Checks for license policy violations across monitored open source dependencies

checks.name: Dependency Vulnerabilities
checks.description: Counts open vulnerabilities by severity and fails if any critical vulnerabilities exist

checks.name: Project Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies that all Snyk projects have active monitoring enabled with recurring tests configured
